# opnsense_ipsec_psk (Resource)
Manages a ipsec psk on OPNsense.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_ipsec_psk" "site2site" {
  identity = "203.0.113.1"
  key      = "super-secret-psk"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `identity` (String) Local identity for the pre-shared key.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the pre-shared key.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) Pre-shared key value. Write-only; not returned by API.
- `key_type` (String) Key type. Defaults to `PSK`.
- `remote_identity` (String) Remote identity for the pre-shared key.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the IPsec pre-shared key in OPNsense.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_ipsec_psk.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
